programs.title: Trees of Life
programs.desc: A two-year journey in Canada’s Gaspé forests revealing the bonds between animals and the trees they rely on.

programs.title: The Pursuit of Endurance: On the Shoulders of Shackleton
programs.desc: Nine adventurers retrace Shackleton’s path, exploring sub-Antarctic islands by boat and ski.

programs.title: Space Explorers: Moonrise on the ISS
programs.desc: Aboard the ISS, seven astronauts train for Artemis—with space as the proving ground for returning to the moon.

programs.title: Subterranean
programs.desc: Two caving teams push for Canada’s deepest records, revealing the drive behind their dangerous descent.

programs.title: Nahanni: River of Forgiveness
programs.desc: In 2018, 16 Dene paddled a 400 km moose-skin boat journey through the sacred Nahanni to revive their culture.

programs.title: Drive
programs.desc: Autonomous cars will change everything, but will humanity lose our love affair with driving?
